text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    finance              Makefile 
  Added files:
    finance/ledgersmb    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
                         pkg-plist 
    finance/ledgersmb/files ledger-smb-httpd.conf.in 
  Log:
  new port: finance/ledgersmb
  
          LedgerSMB is a double entry accounting system, written in Perl.
          Accounting data is stored in a PostgreSQL Server, for the display
          any text or GUI browser can be used.
  
          WWW: http://www.ledgersmb.org/
  
  PR:             ports/112248
  Submitted by:   Antoine Beaupre <anarcat@koumbit.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.54      +1 -0      ports/finance/Makefile
  1.1       +46 -0     ports/finance/ledgersmb/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/finance/ledgersmb/distinfo (new)

  1.1       +2560 -0   ports/finance/ledgersmb/pkg-plist (new)
